error_signature: sidebar does not appear on Apple devices
title: Sidebar not displaying on Apple mobile devices
symptom: When clicking the hamburger menu on Apple devices, the menu does not appear, although the icon disappears. This issue does not occur on Android devices or desktop browsers.
applies_when: Hamburger menu is set to flex
root_cause: The issue arises from the way iOS Mobile Safari/WebKit handles flex containers. The sidebar menu fails to display correctly when the hamburger menu container is set to flex, as it does not adapt the size properly.
fix_steps: Change the container of the hamburger menu from 'flex' to 'block'
Test the sidebar functionality on Apple devices to ensure it displays correctly
agent_instruction: Change the hamburger menu container to 'block' to resolve the display issue on Apple devices.
